description: Realistic RAG golden set built on 7 private documents the LLM has never seen in training (no parametric-knowledge contamination). Corpus: (1) MBA thesis on Y Refrigeration Company marketing strategy (3.7万字, 6 chapters, DOCX), (2) ADR-0004 RAG Agent Loop (MD), (3) ADR-0009 Codegen Sandbox Bridge (MD), (4) consulting article on platform network effects (1.5万字, DOCX), (5) compensation design article (2.7K字, DOCX), (6) Huawei IPD 370 activities (372-row spreadsheet, XLSX), (7) Yunnan Baiyao IT planning (1.9MB, PDF). Subsets: thesis_factual, thesis_synthesis, thesis_numeric, thesis_adversarial, adr_factual, cross_adr, consulting_factual, ipd_table, baiyao_pdf, cross_document. Total: 110 examples. All source_chunks substrings verified present in corpus. Adversarial questions verified absent.

subsets.name: thesis_factual
subsets.description: Single-fact lookups from the thesis. Each answer requires finding the specific chunk containing the fact. Tests dense retrieval precision on a long Chinese document.

must_include: 南京

must_include: 螺旋式速冻机和隧道式速冻机

subsets.name: thesis_numeric
subsets.description: Questions targeting specific numbers, percentages, and calculated figures. Tests precise retrieval of quantitative data from a long document with many interleaved figures.

subsets.name: thesis_adversarial
subsets.description: Questions that sound plausible but have NO answer in the thesis. The correct behavior is to refuse (answer 'not mentioned in the document'). Tests hallucination resistance — the LLM must not fabricate facts from parametric knowledge.

subsets.name: adr_factual
subsets.description: Single-fact lookups from two project ADRs (technical architecture decision records). Tests retrieval on structured Markdown documents with code references, component names, and design decisions.

examples.query: ADR-0004的决策日期是哪一天？
ADR-0004提出将RAG管道转变成由什么驱动的真正的Agent Loop？
examples.expected_answer: 由原生工具调用（native tool calling）驱动
must_include: 由原生工具调用（native tool calling）驱动

examples.query: 根据ADR-0004，RAG Agent Loop的状态机包含哪几个状态？
examples.expected_answer: Plan、ExecuteRetrieve、Answer
must_include: Plan、ExecuteRetrieve、Answer

examples.query: ADR-0004中被废弃（DEPRECATE）的组件是什么？
examples.expected_answer: parse_rag_plan_decision XML解析代码
must_include: parse_rag_plan_decision XML解析代码

examples.query: ADR-0004中被保留（RETAIN）的组件是什么？
examples.expected_answer: EvidenceGate
must_include: EvidenceGate

examples.query: ADR-0004在LlmProvider trait中新增了什么方法来支持结构化工具调用？
examples.expected_answer: complete_with_tools方法
must_include: complete_with_tools方法

examples.query: ADR-0009的沙箱检索桥接使用哪两个管道文件描述符进行通信？
examples.expected_answer: fd3（Python到Host）和fd4（Host到Python）
must_include: fd3（Python到Host）和fd4（Host到Python）

examples.query: 根据ADR-0009，沙箱检索桥接暴露了哪些检索方法？
examples.expected_answer: dense_search、lexical_search、graph_search、rerank、chunk_fetch、doc_summary
must_include: dense_search、lexical_search、graph_search、rerank、chunk_fetch、doc_summary

examples.query: ADR-0009拒绝了哪些备选方案？
examples.expected_answer: 方案A（解封socket+真HTTP）和方案C（预取+变量注入）
must_include: 方案A（解封socket+真HTTP）和方案C（预取+变量注入）

examples.query: 根据ADR-0009，桥接协议中doc_scope由谁强制注入？为什么不由模型传入？
examples.expected_answer: 由宿主从request.doc_scope强制注入，防止越权
must_include: 由宿主从request.doc_scope强制注入，防止越权

examples.query: ADR-0009中实现HostBridge trait的结构体叫什么名字？它持有哪些字段？
examples.expected_answer: RuntimeBridge，持有runtime（Arc<RagRuntime>）、auth（AuthContext）、doc_scope（Vec<String>）
must_include: RuntimeBridge，持有runtime（Arc<RagRuntime>）、auth（AuthContext）、doc_scope（Vec<String>）

examples.query: 根据ADR-0009，哪个文件在落地时被废除？
examples.expected_answer: code_gen_query.rs
must_include: code_gen_query.rs

subsets.name: cross_adr
subsets.description: Questions spanning both ADR-0004 and ADR-0009. Tests cross-document retrieval — the answer requires information from both technical documents in a single response.

examples.query: ADR-0004和ADR-0009分别解决了什么问题？
examples.expected_answer: ADR-0004解决了RAG管道从线性流水线转向Agent Loop+原生工具调用的问题；ADR-0009解决了codegen沙箱封禁网络与SDK走HTTP冲突导致检索主路径不可用的问题
must_include: ADR-0004解决了RAG管道从线性流水线转向Agent Loop+原生工具调用的问题
ADR-0009解决了codegen沙箱封禁网络与SDK走HTTP冲突导致检索主路径不可用的问题

examples.query: ADR-0004和ADR-0009各自的决策日期是什么？
ADR-0004中保留了EvidenceGate作为质量过滤器，ADR-0009中保留的兜底机制叫什么？
examples.expected_answer: run_auto_fallback（dense/lexical兜底）
must_include: run_auto_fallback（dense/lexical兜底）

examples.query: ADR-0004的验证计划分为几个Slice？ADR-0009的分阶段实施分为几个Phase？
examples.expected_answer: ADR-0004分为3个Slice（native tools、loop flow、multi-iteration testing），ADR-0009分为4个Phase（P1 interpreter bridge、P2 rag-core bridge、P3 mock/e2e、P4 telemetry）
must_include: ADR-0004分为3个Slice（native tools、loop flow、multi-iteration testing），ADR-0009分为4个Phase（P1 interpreter bridge、P2 rag-core bridge、P3 mock/e2e、P4 telemetry）

examples.query: ADR-0004废弃了parse_rag_plan_decision，ADR-0009废弃了什么文件？
examples.expected_answer: ADR-0009废弃了code_gen_query.rs
must_include: ADR-0009废弃了code_gen_query.rs

subsets.name: ipd_table
subsets.description: Questions targeting the Huawei IPD spreadsheet (372 rows, 6 columns: 编号/阶段/活动/活动号/活动描述/角色). Tests structured-data retrieval from XLSX — the RAG system must parse tabular data, not just prose. Questions require finding specific rows by phase, activity number, or role.

examples.query: 华为IPD流程包含哪几个阶段？

must_include: 概念阶段、计划阶段、开发阶段、验证阶段、发布阶段、生命周期

subsets.name: baiyao_pdf
subsets.description: Questions targeting the Yunnan Baiyao IT planning PDF (1.9MB). Tests PDF text extraction + retrieval on a consulting proposal with complex layout (tables, architecture diagrams, multi-column text). Questions focus on specific numbers, framework names, and project phases.

examples.query: 云南白药IT规划基于什么架构进行整体设计？
examples.expected_answer: 4A架构
must_include: 4A架构

examples.query: 云南白药IT规划分为几个阶段？每个阶段的时间是什么？
examples.expected_answer: 三个阶段：第一阶段4月18日-4月19日，第二阶段5月6日-5月10日，第三阶段5月13日-5月17日

must_include: 立项通过率≥80%，立项驳回率≥50%

examples.expected_answer: 项目投入≥500万或跨一级流程且项目投入≥300万
must_include: 项目投入≥500万或跨一级流程且项目投入≥300万

must_include: 300万≤项目投入<500万或跨一级流程且100万≤项目投入<300万

subsets.name: cross_document
subsets.description: Questions spanning multiple documents across different formats and topics. Tests doc_scope filtering, disambiguation, and multi-document retrieval — the answer may require distinguishing between similar concepts in different documents or combining facts from unrelated corpora.

examples.query: Y冷冻设备公司的4R策略和云南白药IT规划的4A架构，分别是什么意思？
examples.expected_answer: 4R策略是关联、反应、关系、回报的营销策略框架；4A架构是企业架构设计方法（业务架构、数据架构、应用架构、技术架构）
must_include: 4R策略是关联、反应、关系、回报的营销策略框架
4A架构是企业架构设计方法（业务架构、数据架构、应用架构、技术架构）

examples.query: 论文中Y冷冻设备公司的营销问题和咨询文章中国内企业软件市场的问题，有什么共同的根源？
examples.expected_answer: 两者都指向'生产者导向/销售导向'而非'客户价值导向'的问题——Y冷冻公司以产定销忽视客户需求，国内软件商追求短期签约金额而非客户全生命周期价值

examples.query: ADR-0009中的沙箱检索桥接和华为IPD流程中的模块化设计，在'解耦'思想上有什么联系？
